name: Funeral Rites
text: Give to the Okoye player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: ● Exhaust your alter ego and all [[Dora Milaje]] allies you control → remove Funeral Rites from the game. ● Exhaust 3 [[Dora Milaje]] allies you control. If no ally was exhausted this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

flavor: Nakia has coopted a Wakandan secret weapon -a mimic. She's poisoned it to wreak havoc on innocent civilians!
name: Malevolent Mimic
text: Forced Response: After an ally is defeated, place 2 threat here.

name: Malice
text: Steady. Forced Response: After an ally is defeated, Malice schemes. (Okoye's nemesis minion.)

name: Mimic-27
text: X is equal to your ATK (X is equal to 0 instead if you are in alter-ego form). Forced Interrupt: When Mimic-27 attacks, you must choose an ally to defend against her attack, if able. Forced Response: After Mimic-27 attacks and defeats a character, she attacks again.(Limit once per round.)

name: War Drumming
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Choose a minion in play. That minion attacks you. If the attacking enemy's ATK is 2 or less, it gains villainous for this attack. If its ATK is 3 or more, it gains overkill for this attack. If there are no minions in play, this card gains surge.
